1
Reasoning
+2s, -0.5s

उस समूह का चयन करें जिसमें संख्याएँ उसी प्रकार संबंधित हैं जैसे कि निम्नलिखित समूह की संख्याएँ संबंधित हैं।

[31, 49, 712]

[42, 64, 633] 
[नोट: संख्याओं को उसके घटक अंकों में तोड़े बिना, पूर्ण संख्याओं पर संचालन किया जाना चाहिए। उदाहरण के लिए 13 - 13 पर संचालन जैसे कि 13 में जोड़ना/घटाना/गुणा करना आदि किया जा सकता है। 13 को 1 और 3 में तोड़ना और फिर 1 और 3 पर गणितीय संचालन करना अनुमत नहीं है]

[9, 36, 108]

[25, 81, 522]

[10, 50, 500]

[17,49, 119]

Solution

31×√49=31×7=217

अब, संख्या 217 में अंकों का क्रम उलट दें = 712

42×√64=42×8=336 = 633

इसी प्रकार,

25×√81=25×9=225 = 522

2
Reasoning
+2s, -0.5s

यदि ‘+’ का अर्थ ‘÷’, ‘÷’ का अर्थ ‘×’, ‘×’ का अर्थ ‘-’ और ‘-’ का अर्थ ‘+’ है, तो प्रश्न चिह्न ‘?’ के स्थान पर क्या आएगा?
[729÷9 + 81×4 – 5] − 18= ?

124

72

100

95

Solution

+ = ÷
÷ = ×
× =-
- =+
[729× -4+5]+18
⇒ [81-4+5]+18
⇒82+18=100

3
Reasoning
+2s, -0.5s

एक निश्चित कोड भाषा में, ‘CLOUD’ को FXDPH और ‘BASKET’ को DBLVJN के रूप में कोडित किया गया है। उसी भाषा में ‘ENERGY’ को कैसे कोडित किया जाएगा?

JBJJNX

FBFJNY

JBJFNX

FBJBNX

Solution

Logic: Letter + place value of letter

C+3=F

L+12=X

O+15=D

U+21=P

D+4=H

Similarly,

E+5=J

N+14=B

E+5=J

R+18=J

G+7=N

Y+25=X

Option A

Alternate method:- 

Double the place value 

CLOUD --> 6,24,30,42,8= FXDPH

similarly 

ENERGY ---> JBJJNX

4
Reasoning
+2s, -0.5s

‘P # Q’ का अर्थ है ‘P, Q का भाई है’
‘P @ Q’ का अर्थ है ‘P, Q का पुत्र है’
‘P & Q’ का अर्थ है ‘P, Q की पत्नी है’
‘P % Q’ का अर्थ है ‘P, Q की माता है’


अभिव्यक्ति में: A @ C & E # G & I @ K, C का G से क्या संबंध है?

पत्नी

भाई की पत्नी

बहन का पति 

बहन

Solution


C, G के भाई की पत्नी है।
विकल्प B

दिए गए विकल्पों में से उस आकृति का चयन कीजिए जो निम्नलिखित श्रृंखला में प्रश्न चिह्न ‘?’ के स्थान पर आ सकती है।

Solution

त्रिभुजों की संख्या 1 से बढ़ रही है। चौथे बॉक्स में त्रिभुजों की संख्या 4 है, इसलिए अगले बॉक्स में यह 5 होगी। विकल्प A सही है।

कथन:
कुछ तकिए कुशन हैं।
सभी तकिए पर्दे हैं।
कोई तकिया बिस्तर नहीं है।


निष्कर्ष:
I. कोई बिस्तर कुशन नहीं है।
II. कुछ पर्दे कुशन हैं।
III. सभी पर्दे बिस्तर हैं।

केवल निष्कर्ष I और III अनुसरण करते हैं

केवल निष्कर्ष I और II अनुसरण करते हैं

केवल निष्कर्ष II अनुसरण करता है

केवल निष्कर्ष II और III अनुसरण करते हैं

Solution



केवल II अनुसरण करता है।

केवल ड्रम = 36

5

4

फुटबॉल

पोलो

बैडमिंटन

गोल्फ़

Solution

एज्रा कप एक पोलो टूर्नामेंट है जो भारत में कलकत्ता पोलो क्लब द्वारा प्रतिवर्ष आयोजित किया जाता है।

27
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

भारतीय राष्ट्रीय कांग्रेस की पूर्वगामी संस्था कौन-सी थी?

सर्वेंट्स ऑफ इंडिया सोसाइटी

भारतीय संघ

भारतीय राष्ट्रीय संघ

पूर्व भारतीय संघ

Solution

1876 ​​में सुरेन्द्रनाथ बनर्जी और आनंद मोहन बोस द्वारा स्थापित इंडियन एसोसिएशन, ब्रिटिश भारत में पहला मान्यता प्राप्त राष्ट्रवादी संगठन था और भारतीय राष्ट्रीय कांग्रेस की पूर्वगामी संस्था थी। इसके विपरीत, इंडियन लीग एक यूके-आधारित संगठन था जिसका उद्देश्य भारत के लिए पूर्ण स्वतंत्रता और स्वशासन के लिए अभियान चलाना था।

28
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

भारत की पंचवर्षीय योजनाओं को अंतिम मंजूरी किसके द्वारा दी जाती है?

नीति आयोग

राष्ट्रीय विकास परिषद

भारत के राष्ट्रपति

वित्त मंत्रालय

Solution

भारत में पंचवर्षीय योजनाओं को अंतिम मंजूरी राष्ट्रीय विकास परिषद [NDC] ने दी। योजना आयोग [अब नीति आयोग द्वारा प्रतिस्थापित] योजनाओं का मसौदा तैयार करता था, लेकिन उन्हें अंतिम रूप NDC की मंजूरी के बाद ही दिया जाता था।

29
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

कोशिका झिल्ली को द्विपरत [दो-परत] माना जाता है क्योंकि यह निम्न से बनी होती है:

पानी की परत के दोनों ओर प्रोटीन की दो परते

प्रोटीन की दो परते

कोलेस्ट्रॉल की दो परतें, एक लिपिड

फॉस्फोलिपिड्स की दो परते

Solution

कोशिका झिल्ली फॉस्फोलिपिड्स की दो परतों से बनी होती है। फॉस्फोलिपिड्स में एक हाइड्रोफिलिक [पानी पसंद करने वाला] सिर और एक हाइड्रोफोबिक [पानी से डरने वाला] पूंछ होती है। कोशिका झिल्ली में, हाइड्रोफिलिक सिर कोशिका के अंदर और बाहर दोनों जगह पानी वाले वातावरण का सामना करते हैं, जबकि हाइड्रोफोबिक पूंछ झिल्ली के बीच में एक दूसरे का सामना करते हैं।

30
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

खाद्य पदार्थों को संरक्षित करने के लिए आमतौर पर किस अधातु का उपयोग किया जाता है?

नाइट्रोजन

हाइड्रोजन

लिथियम

हीलियम

Solution

सल्फर और नाइट्रोजन अधातु हैं जिनका उपयोग भोजन को संरक्षित करने के लिए किया जाता है।

31
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

हाल ही में, कौन सा देश अपने संविधान में गर्भपात के अधिकार को शामिल करने वाला पहला देश बन गया?

जर्मनी

फ्रांस

पोलैंड

मलेशिया

Solution

फ्रांस ने अपने संविधान में गर्भपात के अधिकार को शामिल करने वाला पहला देश बनकर इतिहास रच दिया है। ऐतिहासिक संयुक्त संसदीय सत्र में, 780 मतों के भारी बहुमत ने संविधान संशोधन का समर्थन किया, जबकि केवल 72 ने इसका विरोध किया।

32
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

बिहार में अच्छी वर्षा और अच्छी फसल के लिए वर्षा देवता इंद्र को प्रसन्न करने के लिए निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा नृत्य किया जाता है?

जट-जटिन

झिझिया

झुमरी

फगुआ

Solution

झिझिया बिहार के मिथिला क्षेत्र का प्रमुख लोकनृत्य है जो दुर्गा पूजा के अवसर पर आयोजित किया जाता है। यह नृत्य बिहार में अच्छी वर्षा और अच्छी फसल के लिए वर्षा के देवता इंद्र को प्रसन्न करने के लिए किया जाता है।

33
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा नर्तक ओडिसी नृत्य से संबंधित है?

शोवना नारायण

बिरजू महाराज

सुजाता महापात्र

रुक्मिणी देव

Solution

सुजाता महापात्रा एक भारतीय शास्त्रीय नृत्यांगना और 'ओडिसी' नृत्य शैली की शिक्षिका हैं। उनके गुरु 'केलुचरण महापात्रा' हैं। 2011 में उन्होंने अपने गृह नगर बालासोर में एक संस्थान- 'गुरु कीर्ति सृजन' की स्थापना की। ओडिसी नृत्य में उनके योगदान के लिए उन्हें 2017 में संगीत नाटक अकादमी पुरस्कार से सम्मानित किया गया।

34
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

हसदेव नदी पर बना मिनीमाता बांध किस राज्य में स्थित है?

तमिलनाडु

आंध्र प्रदेश

केरल

इनमें से कोई नही

Solution

हसदेव नदी पर बना मिनीमाता बांध भारत के छत्तीसगढ़ राज्य में स्थित है। हसदेव नदी महानदी की महत्वपूर्ण सहायक नदियों में से एक है, जो मुख्य रूप से छत्तीसगढ़ से होकर बहती है। इस बांध का नाम मिनीमाता अगम दास गुरु के नाम पर रखा गया है, जो एक प्रमुख समाज सुधारक और राजनीतिज्ञ थे, जिन्होंने वंचितों, विशेष रूप से अनुसूचित जाति समुदाय के उत्थान के लिए काम किया था।

35
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

भारत और पाकिस्तान के बीच सीमा रेखा ______ का उदाहरण है।

अध्यारोपित सीमा

पूर्ववर्ती सीमा

अवशेष सीमा

अनुवर्ती सीमा

Solution

भारत और पाकिस्तान के बीच सीमा रेखा को अध्यारोपित सीमा का एक उत्कृष्ट उदाहरण माना जाता है, क्योंकि इसे भारत के विभाजन के दौरान क्षेत्र में विद्यमान सांस्कृतिक और जातीय विभाजनों पर विचार किए बिना एक औपनिवेशिक शक्ति [ब्रिटिश] द्वारा खींचा गया था, जिसके कारण महत्वपूर्ण जनसंख्या विस्थापन और निरंतर संघर्ष हुआ।

36
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

निम्नलिखित में से कौन सुत्त पिटक का भाग है?

धम्मसंगनी

मनुस्मृति

विनय पिटक

मझिम निकाय

Solution

विनय पिटक में भिक्षुओं और भिक्षुणियों के मठवासी जीवन पर लागू आचरण और अनुशासन के नियम शामिल हैं। सुत्त पिटक में बुद्ध की मुख्य शिक्षा या धम्म शामिल है। इसे 5 निकायों में विभाजित किया गया है:- दीघ निकाय, मज्झिमा निकाय, संयुक्त निकाय, अंगुत्तर निकाय और खुद्दक निकाय। अभिदम्म पिटक भिक्षुओं की शिक्षा का एक दार्शनिक विश्लेषण और व्यवस्थित करण है।

37
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

क्वाक्वेरेली साइमंड्स [QS] विश्व विश्वविद्यालय रैंकिंग 2024 की इंजीनियरिंग और प्रौद्योगिकी में किस संस्थान ने 45वीं रैंक हासिल की?

आईआईटी बॉम्बे

आईआईटी कानपुर

आईआईटी मद्रास

आईआईटी रुड़की

Solution

2024 क्यूएस वर्ल्ड यूनिवर्सिटी रैंकिंग में इंजीनियरिंग और प्रौद्योगिकी में आईआईटी बॉम्बे 79.1/100 स्कोर के साथ 45वें स्थान पर पहुंच गया। क्यूएस 55 विषयों में विश्वविद्यालयों को रैंक करता है; यूके स्थित एजेंसी द्वारा जारी किए गए परिणाम खनिज और खनन [25वां], डेटा साइंस और एआई [30वां], सिविल और स्ट्रक्चरल इंजीनियरिंग [42वां], और अन्य सहित विभिन्न क्षेत्रों में आईआईटी बॉम्बे की ताकत को उजागर करते हैं।

38
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

बॉलपॉइंट पेन का आविष्कार किसने किया?

बिरो ब्रदर्

वाटरमैन ब्रदर्

बिक ब्रदर्स

राइट ब्रदर्

Solution

हंगरी के भाइयों, लास्ज़लो और जॉर्ज बिरो ने 1894 में पहला बॉल पॉइंट पेन बनाया था। इसके बाद पहला काम करने योग्य फाउंटेन पेन बनाया गया जिसका आविष्कार 1884 में एल.ई. वाटरमैन ने किया था।

39
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

संविधान के किस अनुच्छेद में पाकिस्तान से भारत आये व्यक्ति को नागरिकता देने का प्रावधान है?

अनुच्छेद 5

अनुच्छेद 6

अनुच्छेद 7

अनुच्छेद 8

Solution
  • अनुच्छेद 6 – पाकिस्तान से भारत आए कुछ लोगों को नागरिकता के अधिकार प्रदान किए गए हैं।
  • अनुच्छेद 5 – संविधान के लागू होने के समय भारत में रहने वाले लोगों को नागरिकता प्रदान करता है।
  • अनुच्छेद 7 – भारत से पाकिस्तान चले गए लोगों को नागरिकता देने से इनकार करता है, जब तक कि वे पुनर्वास परमिट के साथ वापस न आ जाएं।
  • अनुच्छेद 8 – विदेश में रहने वाले भारतीयों को नागरिकता प्रदान करता है।
40
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा कदम केंद्रीय बैंक ऋण की समग्र उपलब्धता बढ़ाने के लिए उठाएगा?

यह बाजार में सरकारी प्रतिभूतियों को बेचेगा

वह बाजार से अधिक सरकारी प्रतिभूतियां खरीदेगा

इससे रिवर्स रेपो दर में वृद्धि होगी

इससे रेपो दर में वृद्धि होगी

Solution

ऋण की उपलब्धता बढ़ाने के लिए, केंद्रीय बैंक सरकारी प्रतिभूतियाँ खरीद सकता है, रिज़र्व आवश्यकता को कम कर सकता है, या छूट दर को कम कर सकता है। इन कार्यों से मुद्रा आपूर्ति बढ़ती है, जिससे बैंकों को उधार देने के लिए अधिक धन मिलता है।

41
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

मराठा साम्राज्य के दूसरे संस्थापक के रूप में किसे जाना जाता था?

बालाजी विश्वनाथ

बालाजी बाजी राव

बाजी राव प्रथम

माधव राव

Solution

बालाजी विश्वनाथ को मराठा साम्राज्य के दूसरे संस्थापक के रूप में जाना जाता है। बालाजी विश्वनाथ ने मुगल शासकों के हमले से क्षतिग्रस्त मराठा सम्राट शाहू की पकड़ को मजबूत करने में सहायता की।

42
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

निम्नलिखित में से कौन कार्बनिक यौगिकों का सबसे सरल सदस्य है?

फॉर्मिक एसिड

फॉर्मेल्डिहाइड

मीथेन

मेथनॉल

Solution

मीथेन, एल्केन परिवार का सबसे सरल सदस्य है और वास्तव में कार्बनिक यौगिकों में सबसे सरल है, क्योंकि अन्य सभी यौगिक इसी यौगिक को परिवर्तित करके बनाए जाते हैं।

43
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

इकाई की प्रणाली कौन सी है

SMS सिस्टम

MKP सिस्टम

FPS सिस्टम

CJS सिस्टम

Solution

FPS सिस्टम का मतलब है फुट-पाउंड-सेकंड सिस्टम। यह लंबाई [फुट], द्रव्यमान [पाउंड] और समय [सेकंड] जैसी भौतिक राशियों को मापने के लिए इस्तेमाल की जाने वाली इकाइयों की प्रणालियों में से एक है।

44
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

महासागरीय तल पर भूपर्पटी की मोटाई [किमी में] कितनी है?

5–10

15–20

25–30

35–40

Solution

भूपर्पटी पृथ्वी का सबसे बाहरी ठोस हिस्सा है। यह प्रकृति में भंगुर है। भूपर्पटी की मोटाई महासागरीय और महाद्वीपीय क्षेत्रों में अलग-अलग होती है। महाद्वीपीय भूपर्पटी की तुलना में महासागरीय भूपर्पटी पतली होती है। महासागरीय भूपर्पटी की मोटाई 5-10 किमी होती है।

45
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

यूनेस्को विश्व धरोहर स्थल, वजेट्रेनिका गुफा किस देश में स्थित है?

बोस्निया और हर्ज़ेगोविना

क्रोएशिया और ऑस्ट्रिया

सर्बिया और रूस

मोंटेनेग्रो

Solution

बोस्निया और हर्जेगोविना के रावनो में स्थित वीजेट्रेनिका गुफा में उल्लेखनीय जैव विविधता है। दुनिया की सबसे जैव विविधता वाली गुफा के रूप में, इसमें 200 से अधिक पशु प्रजातियाँ हैं, जिनमें 90 ट्रोग्लोबियन्ट हैं, जो विशेष रूप से गुफाओं में रहने वाले जीव हैं।

46
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

वह क्रांतिकारी नेता कौन थे जिन्होंने अपना जीवन रामकृष्ण मिशन के स्वामी के रूप में समाप्त किया?

अजित सिंह

अरविन्द घोष

जतिन्द्रनाथ बंदोपाध्याय

हेमचंद्र कानूनगो

Solution

जतिन्द्रनाथ बंदोपाध्याय जिन्हें "निरालंब स्वामी" उपनाम से भी जाना जाता है। जतिन्द्रनाथ ने अपने जीवन के अंतिम दिन रामकृष्ण मिशन के स्वामी के रूप में बिताए। वे महर्षि अरविंद के क्रांतिकारी जीवन में उनके साथ रहे। उनका जन्म 19 नवंबर, 1877 को हुआ था और 1930 में उनकी मृत्यु हो गई।

47
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

हाल ही में भारतीय पैरालंपिक समिति [पीसीआई] के नए अध्यक्ष के रूप में किसे चुना गया है?

ललित ठाकुर

सुनील प्रधान

आर. चंद्रशेखर

देवेन्द्र झाझरिया

Solution

भाला फेंक में दो बार के पैरालंपिक स्वर्ण पदक विजेता देवेंद्र झाझरिया, दीपा मलिक का स्थान लेते हुए भारतीय पैरालंपिक समिति [PCI] के नव निर्वाचित अध्यक्ष हैं।

48
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s

भारतीय संविधान की प्रस्तावना को 'भारतीय संविधान की राजनीतिक कुंडली' के रूप में किसने वर्णित किया?

एनए पालखीवाला

ठाकुरदास भार्गव

कन्हैयालाल माणिकलाल मुंशी

भीमराव रामजी अंबेडकर

Solution

कन्हैयालाल माणिकलाल मुंशी ने भारतीय संविधान की प्रस्तावना को 'भारतीय संविधान की राजनीतिक कुंडली' के रूप में वर्णित किया क्योंकि इसमें देश में शासन की स्थापना को परिभाषित किया गया था।

49
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s
पीएम-स्वनिधि योजना किस मंत्रालय द्वारा शुरू की गई है?
कृषि एवं किसान कल्याण मंत्रालय
उपभोक्ता मामले मंत्रालय
खाद्य प्रसंस्करण उद्योग मंत्रालय
आवास और शहरी मामलों का मंत्रालय
Solution
जम्मू नगर निगम के आयुक्त ने हाल ही में जम्मू और कश्मीर में सड़क विक्रेताओं को डोगरी भाषा में पीएम स्वनिधि प्लेटें वितरित कीं। केंद्रीय आवास और शहरी मामलों के मंत्रालय द्वारा आत्मनिर्भर भारत के तहत शुरू की गई पीएम स्वनिधि, सड़क विक्रेताओं को माइक्रो-क्रेडिट ऋण प्रदान करती है।
50
General awareness
+2s, -0.5s
निम्नलिखित में से कौन सी वह सामान्य स्थिति है जो तब विकसित होती है जब प्लाक नामक चिपचिपा पदार्थ आपकी धमनियों के अंदर जमा हो जाता है, जिससे वे कठोर और संकीर्ण हो जाती हैं?
हाइपरविटामिनोसिस
हाइपरएल्डोस्टेरोनिज़्म
एथेरोस्क्लेरोसिस
मल्टीपल स्क्लेरोसिस
Solution
एथेरोस्क्लेरोसिस एक ऐसी बीमारी है जो हृदय और अन्य अंगों तक ऑक्सीजन युक्त रक्त ले जाने वाली रक्त वाहिकाओं को प्रभावित करती है। प्लाक वसा, कोलेस्ट्रॉल, कैल्शियम और अन्य पदार्थों से बना होता है जो धमनियों की भीतरी दीवारों से चिपक जाते हैं। समय के साथ, प्लाक धमनियों को सख्त और संकीर्ण कर सकता है, जिससे रक्त प्रवाह कम हो जाता है और रक्त के थक्के बनने का खतरा बढ़ जाता है।

55
MATHS
+2s, -0.5s

एक चोर सुबह 3:00 बजे एक वैन चुराता है और उसे 54 किमी/घंटा की गति से चलाता है। चोर को सुबह 4:00 बजे खोजा जाता है और मालिक 72 किमी/घंटा की गति से दूसरी वैन से उसका पीछा करना शुरू कर देता है। वह किस समय चोर को पकड़ लेगा?

7:00PM

7:00AM

8:00PM

8:30AM

Solution

एक घंटे में चोर द्वारा तय की गई दूरी = 54 किमी/घंटा ×1 = 54 किमी
चोर और मालिक की सापेक्ष गति = 72 किमी/घंटा-54 किमी/घंटा = 18 किमी/घंटा
समय = दूरी/गति = 54/18 = 3 घंटे
चोर को पकड़ने का समय = सुबह 4 बजे + 3 घंटे = सुबह 7 बजे

t= 14 वर्ष

50/3% वृद्धि

50/3% कमी

100/3% वृद्धि

100/3% कमी

Solution

वास्तविक परिवर्तन
आय    8 ;        +2 [25%]
व्यय     5 ;        +1.5[30%]
वेतन   3 ;        +0.5
उसकी मासिक बचत में प्रतिशत वृद्धि  = 100 = 50/3% वृद्धि

MATHS
+2s, -0.5s

यदि △XYZ≅△MNO, XY=2m+1, YZ=2p+2, XZ=7, MN=5, MO=2x-1 & NO=8. तो m+x+p का मान ज्ञात कीजिए।

13

9

7

6

Solution

△XYZ≅△MNO
XY=MN, YZ=NO, XZ=MO
XY=MN
2m+1=5
m=2
YZ=NO
2p+2=8
p=3
XZ=MO
7=2x-1
x=4
m+x+p= 2+3+4=9

63
MATHS
+2s, -0.5s

उर्वशी एक कीबोर्ड 20% लाभ पर ₹1,260 में बेचती है, और दूसरा कीबोर्ड 10% हानि पर ₹1080 में बेचती है। उसका कुल लाभ या हानि प्रतिशत क्या है?

4% हानि

2% लाभ

4% लाभ

2% हानि

Solution

20% लाभ = CP: SP =5:6→1260, CP=5×210=1050
10% हानि = CP: SP=10:9→1080, CP=10×120=1200
कुल लाभ या हानि=SP-CP=2340-2250=90
कुल लाभ प्रतिशत = ×100= =4% लाभ

यदि एक आयताकार मैदान जिसकी लंबाई और चौड़ाई ‘x’ और ‘y’ हैं, का अर्ध-परिमाप और क्षेत्रफल क्रमशः 12 cm और 28 cm2 है, तो x4 + x2y2 + y4 का मान ज्ञात कीजिए।

6609

6960

6906

6690

Solution

आयत का अर्ध परिमाप = लंबाई + चौड़ाई = x + y = 12,
आयत का क्षेत्रफल = लंबाई × चौड़ाई = xy = 28 cm2

4 π

8 π

6 π

7 π

चाप की लंबाई= 4 π

1st year 25:26 ]×2

साझेदारी व्यवसाय में, B की पूंजी A की पूंजी की आधी थी। यदि 8 महीने बाद, B ने अपनी पूंजी का आधा हिस्सा निकाल लिया और 2 महीने बाद A ने अपनी पूंजी का 1/4 हिस्सा निकाल लिया, तो एक वर्ष बाद B और A का लाभ अनुपात होगा:

32:15

23:10

10:23

5:2

Solution

मान लीजिए A की पूंजी 8x है
तो, B की पूंजी 4x होगी
A: B = [8x ×10+6x ×2] : [4x ×8+2x ×4] =92x:40x =23:10
B: A= 10:23

20.4

22.4

26.4

25.4

Solution

1 कुकी का C.P. = 76/20 = 3.8
लाभ = [S.P. – C.P.] + 3 कुकी का C.P.
= 85 – 76 + 3× 3.8 = ₹20.4

मार्च

अप्रैल

मई

76
English
+2s, -0.5s

The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error.

He made me to

apologize for his mistake

after the meeting.

No error

Solution

The error lies in segment "He made me to".
CONCEPT:

  • The verb "make" is a causative verb, and when it is used in the causative sense, it is followed by the base form [bare infinitive] of the verb, without "to."

  • Therefore, "He made me to apologize" is incorrect because the infinitive "to" should not be used here.

  • The correct sentence should use the bare infinitive "apologize" after "made."

Here are some more examples for better understanding:

  • She made him go to the store. [Correct]

  • They made us wait for hours. [Correct]

Correct Sentence: " He made me apologize for his mistake after the meeting."

77
English
+2s, -0.5s
Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank.
If ________ is favourable, we will go for a picnic.
Climate
Whether
Weather
Season
Solution
The correct answer is: Weather
Explanation: The word "weather" is the most appropriate choice because it refers to the atmospheric conditions, such as temperature, precipitation, and wind, which can directly affect our decision to go for a walk.
Here are the meanings and examples of all options:
• Weather [Correct] – मौसम – Refers to the atmospheric conditions at a specific time [e.g., temperature, rain, wind].
Example: "If the weather permits, we will go for a walk."
• Climate – जलवायु – Refers to the long-term patterns of weather in a region over a prolonged period.
Example: "The climate in this region is very hot and dry."
• Season – ऋतु – Refers to one of the four periods [spring, summer, autumn, winter] characterized by particular weather conditions.
Example: "Summer is the best season to go to the beach."
• Whether – क्या – Used to introduce alternatives or a choice between two possibilities.
Example: "I don’t know whether he will come to the party."
Therefore, "weather" is the best fit to express the idea of atmospheric conditions influencing the decision to go for a walk.
78
English
+2s, -0.5s

Select the option that will improve the underlined part of the given sentence. In case no improvement is needed, select 'No improvement required'.
A few word of gratitude can make a big difference in someone's day.

Few word of

A few words of

The few words

No Improvement

Solution

Correct Answer: A few words of
Explanation:
The sentence requires the use of "a few words of" to convey the correct meaning. "A few" indicates a small but sufficient quantity, and "words" should be in the plural form. The phrase "a few words of" is the proper way to express the idea that a small amount of something [in these cases, words] can have a meaningful impact.
Corrected sentence: "A few words of gratitude can make a big difference in someone's day."

79
English
+2s, -0.5s

Select the Grammatically correct sentence -

May she to achieve great success in her career and lead a fulfilling life.

Let she go to the party with her friends.

May the team wins the championship this year.

Let them enjoy the concert and have a great time.

Solution

Correct Answer: Let them enjoy the concert and have a great time.
Explanation:
• Option [D] "Let them enjoy the concert and have a great time."
This is correct because after the word "let," we use the object pronoun "them," and the verbs "enjoy" and "have" are correctly in their base forms. This follows the rules for optative sentences where the verb after "let" should be in its base form.
Why the other options are incorrect:
• Option [A] "May she to achieve great success in her career and lead a fulfilling life."
Error: The phrase "to achieve" is incorrect. After "may" in optative sentences, we use the base form of the verb without "to."
Corrected Sentence: "May she achieve great success in her career and lead a fulfilling life."
• Option [B] "Let she go to the party with her friends."
Error: The pronoun "she" is used incorrectly. After "let," we should use the object pronoun "her," not the subject pronoun "she."
Corrected Sentence: "Let her go to the party with her friends."
• Option [C] "May the team wins the championship this year."
Error: The verb "wins" is incorrect. After "may" in optative sentences, we use the base form of the verb.
Corrected Sentence: "May the team win the championship this year."

80
English
+2s, -0.5s

Identify the word that is correctly spelt.

Exuberant

Exubrent

Exuberent

Exubrant

Solution

The correct spelling is "Exuberant."
Exuberant [Correct] – उल्लासपूर्ण – To be filled with excitement, energy, or enthusiasm.
Example: "The children were exuberant after receiving their prizes."

81
English
+2s, -0.5s

Select the option that will improve the underlined part of the given sentence. In case no improvement is needed, select 'No improvement required'.
They had a big fight, but they made out by the end of the day.

Made over

Made up

Made in

No improvement

Solution

The correct answer is: Made up
Explanation: In this sentence, the phrase "made up" is the most appropriate. "Make up" means to reconcile or resolve a disagreement after a quarrel, which fits with the idea of the individuals resolving their conflict by the end of the day.
Here are the meanings and examples of all options:

  • Made out – समझना/सफल होना–achieving success in a challenging situation.

Example: “He made out fine during the difficult project and earned the promotion.”

  • Made over – पुनर्निर्मित करना – To renovate, transform, or change the appearance of something.

Example: "She made over the old house into a modern apartment."

  • Made up [Correct] – समझौता करना – To reconcile or resolve a disagreement, usually after a fight or argument.

Example: "They had a big fight, but they made up by the end of the day."

  • Made in – निर्मित – Refers to the origin or place where something was produced.

Example: "This chair was made in Italy."
Corrected sentence: "They had a big fight, but they made up by the end of the day."

82
English
+2s, -0.5s

Select the most appropriate synonym of the underlined word in the following sentence -
For a fleeting moment the Master reappeared.

Magical

Steady

Momentary

Critical

Solution

Correct Answer: Momentary
Explanation: The word "fleeting" refers to something that lasts for a very short period of time. The most appropriate synonym for "fleeting" in this context is "momentary", which also means lasting for only a brief moment.
Let's see the meanings of all the words:

  • Fleeting – क्षणिक – Lasting for a very short time.
    Example: "For a fleeting moment, he thought he had seen her again."

  • Momentary – क्षणिक – Lasting for a very short time, similar to fleeting.
    Example: "The pain was momentary, and soon it passed."

  • Magical – जादुई – Something that is enchanting or extraordinary.
    Example: "The night felt magical as the stars lit up the sky."

  • Steady – स्थिर – Constant or unchanging over time.
    Example: "He gave a steady performance throughout the competition."

  • Critical – महत्वपूर्ण – Extremely important or crucial, often in a difficult or decisive situation.
    Example: "She made a critical decision that changed the outcome of the game."

Corrected Sentence: "For a momentary moment, the Master reappeared."

83
English
+2s, -0.5s

Select the most appropriate antonym of the given word.
MALLEABLE

Flexible

Intractable

Fragile

Amenable

Solution

Correct Answer: Intractable
Explanation:
The word "malleable" refers to something that is easily shaped, influenced, or adaptable. The opposite of malleable, which suggests flexibility and ease of manipulation, is "intractable," meaning something that is difficult or impossible to control or influence.
Let’s see the meanings of all the options along with their usage:

  • Malleable – लचीला / बदलने योग्य – Refers to something that can be shaped or altered easily, especially when discussing metals or personalities.
    Example: "Gold is malleable and can be hammered into thin sheets."

  • Intractable – जिद्दी / कठोर – Refers to something that is difficult to manage, control, or influence. This is the direct opposite of malleable.
    Example: "The problem was intractable and couldn’t be solved with the current methods."

  • Flexible – लचीला – Refers to something that can bend or adapt
    Example: "The material is flexible and can be stretched without breaking."

  • Fragile – नाजुक – Refers to something that is delicate or easily broken. It’s not the opposite of malleable, as malleable objects can be bent or shaped without breaking.
    Example: "The fragile vase shattered when it hit the floor."

  • Amenable – सहायक – Refers to someone who is open to suggestions or influence, making it similar in meaning to malleable

Example: "She was amenable to the idea of working together on the project."

84
English
+2s, -0.5s

Choose the most appropriate option to make the sentence sensibly correct.
That week the dollar dropped _______ its lowest levels.

At

By

Towards

To

Solution

Correct Answer: To
Explanation: The correct preposition to use with "dropped" in this context is "to." When referring to a movement or change in level or position, "to" indicates the direction toward a specific point or limit. In this case, the dollar dropped to its lowest levels, implying it reached that specific point.
Corrected Sentence: "That week the dollar dropped to its lowest levels."

85
English
+2s, -0.5s

Select the most appropriate meaning for the given idiom.
Butterflies in the stomach

Extremely hungry

To be anxious and nervous

Feeling calm and relaxed

To be confused or uncertain

Solution

The correct answer is: To be anxious and nervous.
Explanation: The idiom "butterflies in the stomach" refers to the feeling of nervousness or anxiety that people often experience before an important event, performance, or situation. This sensation is often described as a fluttery or uneasy feeling in the stomach, similar to how butterflies might flutter around.
Origin of the Idiom: The idiom originates from the physical sensation of nervousness, which can feel like small movements or flutters in the stomach. This "butterfly" feeling is often associated with anxiety or anticipation before something significant.
Example: "Before giving her speech, she had butterflies in her stomach."
Hindi – "अपनी भाषण देने से पहले, उसे पेट में तितलियाँ सी महसूस हो रही थीं।"
Therefore, the correct meaning of the idiom "butterflies in the stomach" is "to be anxious and nervous."

86
English
+2s, -0.5s

Identify the segment in the sentence that contains grammatical error.

The Three Musketeers

have remained a classic

novel for many years

No error

Solution

Error in segment: have remained a classic
Explanation:

  • The title "The Three Musketeers" refers to a single book [singular in meaning], even though the words "three" and "musketeers" are plural. This is why a singular verb ["has remained"] should be used instead of the plural verb "have remained."

Here are some more examples for better understanding:

  • "The Lord of the Rings has been adapted into several movies."

  • The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes has been a popular detective novel.

Corrected Sentence: “The Three Musketeers has remained a classic novel for many years."

87
English
+2s, -0.5s
Select the most appropriate SYNONYM of the given word.
RECOLLECT
Dodge
Save
Repeat
Remember
Solution
The correct answer is: Remember.
Explanation:
The word "recollect" means to recall or remember something from the past. The synonym that closely matches this meaning is "remember," which refers to the act of bringing something back to mind or recalling a past experience or thought.
Let’s see the meaning of all the words:
• Recollect – याद करना – To recall or remember something from the past.
Example: "I tried to recollect the details of the meeting."
• Dodge – बचना – To avoid or escape something.
Example: "He dodged the question with a quick answer."
• Save – बचाना – To keep something for later or protect it.
Example: "She saved her work on the computer."
• Repeat – दोहराना – To say or do something again, which is not a synonym for recollect.
Example: "Can you repeat what you just said?"
• Remember – याद रखना – To bring something to mind, the closest match to "recollect."
Example: "She tried to remember what she had learned in class."
88
English
+2s, -0.5s

Select the most appropriate antonym of the underlined word in the following sentence-
They didn't even have the COURTESY to apologize.

Rudeness

Boldness

Courage

Insecurity

Solution

The correct answer is: Rudeness.
Explanation:
The word "courtesy" refers to polite behaviour, kindness, or respect toward others. The opposite of courtesy would be "rudeness," which denotes a lack of manners, respect, or politeness.
Let’s see the meaning of all the words:
• Courtesy – शिष्टता – Politeness, kindness, or respectful behavior toward others.
Example: "She showed great courtesy when meeting new people."
• Rudeness – अशिष्टता – The lack of respect, politeness, or good manners.
Example: "His rudeness towards the guests was very noticeable."
• Boldness – साहस – Courage or willingness to take risks, unrelated to politeness or manners.
Example: "His boldness allowed him to stand up and speak his mind."
• Courage – साहस – The ability to face fear or danger, unrelated to politeness or respect.
Example: "She showed great courage during the difficult situation."
• Insecurity – असुरक्षा – A lack of confidence, unrelated to politeness or manners.
Example: "His insecurity made him hesitate to express his opinion."

89
English
+2s, -0.5s

Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank.
The _______ of the perfume costs more than a _______.

Sent, Cent

Scent, Sent

Scent, Cent

Cent, Scent

Solution

The correct answer is: Scent, Cent.
Explanation of all Homonyms:
• Scent – खुशबू – Refers to a fragrance or smell, particularly a pleasant one like that of a perfume.
Example: "The scent of the perfume lingered in the air."
• Cent – सेंट – A unit of currency, often used to refer to coins, particularly in small denominations.
Example: "The candy only costs a few cents."
• Sent – भेजा – The past tense of "send," meaning to have dispatched or delivered something.
Example: "She sent the letter to her friend."
Correct Answer Explanation: The sentence should read: "The scent of the perfume costs more than a cent." This is the correct choice because "scent" refers to the fragrance of the perfume and "cent" refers to a small unit of currency, making the sentence logically sound
.

90
English
+2s, -0.5s

Select the word which means the same as the group of words.
Fit to be eaten

Audible

Glutton

Healthy

Edible

Solution

The correct answer is: Edible.
Explanation:
• Audible – श्रव्य – Refers to something that can be heard.
Example: "The sound was barely audible due to the noise in the room."
• Glutton – लालची व्यक्ति – A person who eats to excess or is greedy about food.
Example: "The glutton devoured the entire pizza by himself."
• Healthy – स्वस्थ – Refers to something that is beneficial to health, but not necessarily fit to be eaten.
Example: "Eating vegetables is healthy for your body."
• Edible – खाने योग्य – Refers to something that is fit to be eaten or safe to consume.
Example: "These berries are edible and can be added to your salad."
Therefore, "edible" is the correct choice, as it describes something that is suitable for eating.

91
English
+2s, -0.5s

Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom.
The changes benefited management, but left the workers out in the cold.

Received extra rewards

Excluded or ignored

Sent in cold or chilly places to visit

Treated with fairness

Solution

The correct answer is: Excluded or ignored.
Explanation:
The idiom "left out in the cold" refers to being excluded or ignored from something, often a group or situation. It implies that someone is left out or neglected, while others are included or benefited.
Origin of the Idiom:
The phrase "left out in the cold" originates from the idea of being physically outside in the cold, symbolizing isolation or neglect. It conveys the feeling of being disregarded or not part of the group that is receiving benefits or attention.
Example:
"Although the new policy helped the executives, it left the workers out in the cold, with no improvements for them."
Therefore, the correct meaning of the idiom "left out in the cold" is "excluded or ignored."

92
English
+2s, -0.5s

Select the word which means the same as the group of words given.
One who has suddenly gained new wealth, power or prestige

Tycoon

Parvenu

Billionaire

Entrepreneur

Solution

The correct answer is: Parvenu.
Explanation of all Options:
• Tycoon – धनी व्यापारी – A wealthy and influential person in business or industry.
Example: "He is a tycoon in the tech industry."
• Parvenu – नवधनाढ्य व्यक्ति – A person who has suddenly gained wealth, power, or prestige, often in a way that is seen as lacking the refinement of traditional wealth.
Example: "The parvenu was rapidly gaining influence in the city, though some still looked down on him."
• Billionaire – अरबपति – A person with a net worth of at least a billion units of currency, often not related to sudden acquisition.
Example: "The billionaire made his fortune in real estate."
• Entrepreneur – उद्यमी – A person who starts and runs a business, taking on financial risks.
Example: "The entrepreneur launched a successful tech start up."
Therefore, "parvenu" is the correct word for who has suddenly gained new wealth, power or prestige. The correct answer is: Parvenu.
Explanation of all Options:
• Tycoon – धनी व्यापारी – A wealthy and influential person in business or industry.
Example: "He is a tycoon in the tech industry."
• Parvenu – नवधनाढ्य व्यक्ति – A person who has suddenly gained wealth, power, or prestige, often in a way that is seen as lacking the refinement of traditional wealth.
Example: "The parvenu was rapidly gaining influence in the city, though some still looked down on him."
• Billionaire – अरबपति – A person with a net worth of at least a billion units of currency, often not related to sudden acquisition.
Example: "The billionaire made his fortune in real estate."
• Entrepreneur – उद्यमी – A person who starts and runs a business, taking on financial risks.
Example: "The entrepreneur launched a successful tech start up."
Therefore, "parvenu" is the correct word for who has suddenly gained new wealth, power or prestige.

93
English
+2s, -0.5s
Arrange the sentences in the correct order to form a meaningful paragraph.
A. Sitting in the Victor Force operations room in Awantipura.
B. And inquired when we had last patrolled that area.
C. He suddenly pointed a laser light to a part of the heights above Tral.
D. The General asked a very important question.
ACBD
ADBC
DCBA
DABC
Solution
Correct Answer: ADBC
Explanation:
• A sets the scene: "Sitting in the Victor Force operations room in Awantipura."
• D introduces the key event: "The General asked a very important question."
• B follows with what the question was about: "And inquired when we had last patrolled that area."
• C concludes with the General’s action: "He suddenly pointed a laser light to a part of the heights above Tral."
Final Paragraph:
Sitting in the Victor Force operations room in Awantipura, The General asked a very important question. And inquired when we had last patrolled that area. He suddenly pointed a laser light to a part of the heights above Tral.
94
English
+2s, -0.5s

Choose the most appropriate option to change the voice of given sentence.
None likes him.

He was liked by none.

He was not liked by anyone.

He has not been liked by anyone.

He is not liked by anyone.

Solution

The correct answer is: He is not liked by anyone.
Explanation: The given sentence in active voice is:
None likes him.
This follows the structure: Subject + Verb + Object → None [subject] + likes [verb] + him [object].
To convert this into passive voice, the object "him" becomes the subject and the verb "likes" changes to its passive form "is liked." The sentence then follows the structure:
Object + am/are/is + past participle + by + subject.
So, the passive voice form of the sentence is: He is not liked by anyone.

  • The object "him" becomes the subject "he."

  • The verb "likes" is changed to "is liked."

  • "None" is replaced with "anyone" to convey a more natural passive structure.

95
English
+2s, -0.5s

Change the narration of the given sentence.
He said, "I was writing a letter yesterday."

He said that he will be writing a letter the next day.

He said that he had been writing a letter the day before.

He said that he had written a letter the day before.

He said that he would be writing a letter the next day.

Solution

The correct answer is: He said that he had been writing a letter the day before.
Explanation:

  • The given sentence in direct speech is: "I was writing a letter yesterday," said he.

  • To convert this into indirect speech, we follow the following rules:

    • When converting this into indirect speech, the reporting verb "said" remains the same

    • The past continuous tense "was writing" in direct speech is converted to the past perfect continuous tense "had been writing" in indirect speech because the sentence refers to an action that was happening in the past, prior to the time of reporting.

    • The word "yesterday" in direct speech is converted to "the day before" in indirect speech to maintain the proper time shift.

96
English
+2s, -0.5s

A popular Russian saying suggests that when purchasing a home, one should focus more on the neighbourhood than the house itself. In the past, it was challenging to control who your neighbours ____1____ be. However, with the advent of the Internet and the group buying model, it’s now possible to create your dream community when buying a home. The concept of group buying, once ____2____ in industries like automobiles, baby products, and pet care, is now gaining traction in the real estate sector. Numerous websites and brokerage firms in India are offering group deals on real estate projects, making this trend more ____3____ to homebuyers. The process is straightforward. For instance, take the example of xxx.com, an integrated online and offline platform that showcases properties. This platform uses social media networks to inform potential buyers about attractive deals. Buyers can then ____4____ in viral marketing to gather a large group of interested buyers, enabling them to negotiate a better discount with the developer. The group buying model ____5____ heavily on customer participation. However, some wonder if this model is just a passing trend. It bears similarities to developers working with speculators who purchase properties in bulk before a project begins, often receiving discounts of 30% to 40%.
Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 1 -

could

should

will

would

Solution

Explanation - The sentence "In the past, it was challenging to control who your neighbours would be" implies that it was difficult to predict or determine who your neighbours would turn out to be. The verb "would" is used to express a future-in-the-past or a hypothetical situation, which fits perfectly in this context.

97
English
+2s, -0.5s

A popular Russian saying suggests that when purchasing a home, one should focus more on the neighbourhood than the house itself. In the past, it was challenging to control who your neighbours ____1____ be. However, with the advent of the Internet and the group buying model, it’s now possible to create your dream community when buying a home. The concept of group buying, once ____2____ in industries like automobiles, baby products, and pet care, is now gaining traction in the real estate sector. Numerous websites and brokerage firms in India are offering group deals on real estate projects, making this trend more ____3____ to homebuyers. The process is straightforward. For instance, take the example of xxx.com, an integrated online and offline platform that showcases properties. This platform uses social media networks to inform potential buyers about attractive deals. Buyers can then ____4____ in viral marketing to gather a large group of interested buyers, enabling them to negotiate a better discount with the developer. The group buying model ____5____ heavily on customer participation. However, some wonder if this model is just a passing trend. It bears similarities to developers working with speculators who purchase properties in bulk before a project begins, often receiving discounts of 30% to 40%.
Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 2 -

denied

rejected

applied

acquitted

Solution

Explanation - The correct answer is Option C: applied.
The sentence implies that the concept of group buying was already being used or applied in other industries before it gained traction in the real estate sector.
Other options like "denied", "rejected", and "acquitted" don't fit the context as they convey opposite or unrelated meanings.

98
English
+2s, -0.5s

A popular Russian saying suggests that when purchasing a home, one should focus more on the neighbourhood than the house itself. In the past, it was challenging to control who your neighbours ____1____ be. However, with the advent of the Internet and the group buying model, it’s now possible to create your dream community when buying a home. The concept of group buying, once ____2____ in industries like automobiles, baby products, and pet care, is now gaining traction in the real estate sector. Numerous websites and brokerage firms in India are offering group deals on real estate projects, making this trend more ____3____ to homebuyers. The process is straightforward. For instance, take the example of xxx.com, an integrated online and offline platform that showcases properties. This platform uses social media networks to inform potential buyers about attractive deals. Buyers can then ____4____ in viral marketing to gather a large group of interested buyers, enabling them to negotiate a better discount with the developer. The group buying model ____5____ heavily on customer participation. However, some wonder if this model is just a passing trend. It bears similarities to developers working with speculators who purchase properties in bulk before a project begins, often receiving discounts of 30% to 40%.
Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 3 -

desirable

hummable

culpable

accessible

Solution

Explanation - The correct answer is Option D: accessible.
The sentence implies that the trend of group buying in real estate is becoming more available or reachable to homebuyers due to numerous websites and brokerage firms offering group deals.
"Accessible" fits perfectly in this context, conveying the idea that homebuyers can now easily avail of this option.
Other options don't fit as well:
- "Desirable" implies attractiveness or appeal, which isn't the primary focus here.
- "Hummable" is unrelated to the context it refers to a catchy tune.
- "Culpable" implies blame or responsibility, which doesn't fit the context.

99
English
+2s, -0.5s

A popular Russian saying suggests that when purchasing a home, one should focus more on the neighbourhood than the house itself. In the past, it was challenging to control who your neighbours ____1____ be. However, with the advent of the Internet and the group buying model, it’s now possible to create your dream community when buying a home. The concept of group buying, once ____2____ in industries like automobiles, baby products, and pet care, is now gaining traction in the real estate sector. Numerous websites and brokerage firms in India are offering group deals on real estate projects, making this trend more ____3____ to homebuyers. The process is straightforward. For instance, take the example of xxx.com, an integrated online and offline platform that showcases properties. This platform uses social media networks to inform potential buyers about attractive deals. Buyers can then ____4____ in viral marketing to gather a large group of interested buyers, enabling them to negotiate a better discount with the developer. The group buying model ____5____ heavily on customer participation. However, some wonder if this model is just a passing trend. It bears similarities to developers working with speculators who purchase properties in bulk before a project begins, often receiving discounts of 30% to 40%.
Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 4 -

engage

gauge

encourage

prestige

Solution

Explanation - The correct answer is Option A: engage.
The sentence implies that buyers can participate or take part in viral marketing to gather a large group of interested buyers.
"Engage in" is a common idiomatic expression that means to participate or take part in an activity. In this context, "engage in viral marketing" fits perfectly, conveying the idea of actively participating in marketing efforts to spread the word.
Other options don't fit as well:
- "Gauge" implies measuring or assessing something.
- "Encourage" implies promoting or supporting something, but it doesn't fit grammatically in this context.
- "Prestige" is a noun that refers to reputation or status, and it doesn't fit grammatically or semantically in this context.

100
English
+2s, -0.5s

A popular Russian saying suggests that when purchasing a home, one should focus more on the neighbourhood than the house itself. In the past, it was challenging to control who your neighbours ____1____ be. However, with the advent of the Internet and the group buying model, it’s now possible to create your dream community when buying a home. The concept of group buying, once ____2____ in industries like automobiles, baby products, and pet care, is now gaining traction in the real estate sector. Numerous websites and brokerage firms in India are offering group deals on real estate projects, making this trend more ____3____ to homebuyers. The process is straightforward. For instance, take the example of xxx.com, an integrated online and offline platform that showcases properties. This platform uses social media networks to inform potential buyers about attractive deals. Buyers can then ____4____ in viral marketing to gather a large group of interested buyers, enabling them to negotiate a better discount with the developer. The group buying model ____5____ heavily on customer participation. However, some wonder if this model is just a passing trend. It bears similarities to developers working with speculators who purchase properties in bulk before a project begins, often receiving discounts of 30% to 40%.
Choose the most appropriate option to fill in the blank 5 -

advocates

desires

relies

supplies

Solution

Explanation - The correct answer is Option C: relies.
The sentence implies that the group buying model depends heavily on customer participation.
"Relies on" is a common idiomatic expression that means to depend or be dependent on something or someone. In this context, "relies heavily on customer participation" fits perfectly, conveying the idea that the model's success is heavily dependent on customers actively participating.
Other options don't fit as well:
- "Advocates" implies supporting or promoting something.
- "Desires" implies wanting or wishing for something, which doesn't fit the context.
- "Supplies" implies providing or furnishing something, which doesn't fit the context.
